summary: Tested WebSocket real-time implementation replacing polling. Fixed critical JavaScript hoisting bug in NotificationsPage and AlertsPage. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection at external URL initially connects to Webpack dev server due to ingress routing. However, after page load, reconnect successfully connects to backend. This is a transient startup issue.

issues: Recharts console warnings about width/height being -1 during initial render. Non-blocking but could be improved with minWidth/minHeight props.

fixed_issues.issue: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'fetchAlerts' before initialization - JavaScript hoisting issue with useRealtimeRefresh hook
fixed_issues.fix: Moved fetchAlerts function definition before useEffect/useRealtimeRefresh hooks and wrapped in useCallback
Same fix - moved fetchAlerts before hooks and used useCallback

critical_code_review_comments: useAlertSound hook still uses 8-second polling interval for sound notifications - could be migrated to WebSocket events for consistency, but works correctly as-is

features_verified.websocket_connection: PASS - WebSocket connects to /ws endpoint, shows '[WS] Connected' in console
features_verified.live_indicator: PASS - 'مباشر' with green pulsing dot visible on Dashboard and DepartmentOverview
features_verified.websocket_broadcasts: PASS - Backend middleware (RealtimeBroadcastMiddleware) correctly broadcasts on POST/PUT/DELETE
features_verified.employee_actions: PASS - /employees/{id}/{action} endpoints (activate-account, freeze-account, reset-pin) all working
features_verified.no_polling_for_data: PASS - setInterval only used for: animation (counting numbers), auth token refresh, sound alert checking - NOT for data polling
features_verified.dashboard_load: PASS - Operations dashboard loads with KPIs, department cards, alerts
features_verified.notifications_page: PASS - Fixed and working with real-time updates
features_verified.alerts_page: PASS - Fixed and working with real-time updates
features_verified.department_overview: PASS - Live indicator present, real-time updates working

context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket implementation verified working. NotificationsPage and AlertsPage were fixed for JavaScript hoisting issue. All employee account action endpoints use pattern /employees/{id}/{action} and work correctly. Recharts warnings about width/height are cosmetic only.
